markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the GrowthX engagement and review the transition plan.](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Partnership Ends Feb 9:** GrowthX will deliver final assets (article export, Knotion strategy doc) by Feb 6 to ensure a smooth transition.](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** SchoolAI is shifting from a content-heavy strategy to a performance-focused model with a new agency, 97th Floor.](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [**New Agency Scope:** The new $8k/mo retainer covers a Framer-to-Webflow migration to fix technical SEO debt, plus a focused content plan (\~10 pieces/mo) and backlinking.](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [**Key Insight:** SchoolAI can capture revenue by targeting high-intent commercial keywords (e.g., "AI platform for education") that competitors like Magic School currently own.](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)

## Topics

### Partnership Disengagement Rationale

  - [The partnership's focus on high-volume content and traffic was misaligned with SchoolAI's need for a comprehensive, revenue-driven strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**SchoolAI's Need:** A strategy covering technical SEO, off-page factors (backlinks), and content focused on revenue-driving personas (administrators).](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Insight:** The initial content-heavy focus may have stemmed from SchoolAI's own request, rather than a GrowthX consultation on optimal strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)

### New Agency & Strategy

  - [**Agency:** 97th Floor (local, performance-focused).](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [**Retainer:** $8,000/month.](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [**New Strategy Pillars:**](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
      - [**Website Migration:** Framer → Webflow to resolve significant technical SEO debt.](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
      - [**Content:** Reduced volume (\~10 pieces/mo), focused on revenue-driving personas (administrators).](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
      - [**SEO:** Technical fixes, backlinking, and internal linking to build authority.](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)

### SEO Strategy Insights from GrowthX

  - [**Keyword Analysis:** A spreadsheet was shared, scoring keywords by business potential (1-3) to create a revenue-aligned content funnel.](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [**Competitor Gap Analysis (Magic School):**](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - **Problem:** Magic School's homepage ranks \#1 for high-intent commercial keywords (e.g., "AI Platform for Education"), while SchoolAI is on page 2+.
      - [**Opportunity:** SchoolAI can capture this revenue by outranking Magic School for these terms.](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [**Keyword Targeting Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Many high-intent keywords are teacher-focused, but SchoolAI's buyers are administrators.](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
      - [**Solution:** Target these keywords, but tailor the landing page content to administrators.](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Admins search for solutions for their teachers and will consider platforms that address their needs, even if the keyword is teacher-centric.](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
      - [**Validation:** Use qualitative analysis of sales calls to confirm admin search intent before executing.](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [**Hypothesis-Driven Approach:**](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - [**Test:** If SchoolAI outranks Magic School for a key commercial term, will it drive a measurable increase in revenue?](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - **Method:** Measure homepage conversion rates, deal open rates, and customer LTV during a test period after achieving a \#1 ranking.

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
      - [Deliver final articles this week.](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
      - [Send data export (ReadsView, assignments) and Knotion strategy doc (PDF) by Feb 6.](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
      - [Export the keyword analysis spreadsheet.](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [**SchoolAI:**](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
      - [Copy all articles from the shared Google Drive folder.](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
      - [Begin the transition with 97th Floor.](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
      - [Consider a future check-in after SchoolAI's new strategy is established.](https://fathom.video/share/GszrDUFAFoxk2wyADvnrAUvLtfAxTzQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
